rulings.Case Title: ROBERT J. BOCKELMAN VS. JONATHAN NEWHOUSE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, February 18, 2009, line 8, PLAINTIFF ROBERT BOCKELMAN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES. The Court finds 26.8 hours of attorney's hours to be reasonable and necessary. Attorney's billable rate of $275.00 per hour is reasonable. Defendant shall pay plaintiff's counsel, Robert L. Ferris, attorney's fees in the amount of $7,370.00. Interest shall accrue on this award from the date of this order at the legal rate. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: IQBAL PARUPIA VS. INTERNATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF BUSINESS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, February 18, 2009, line 12, DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF BUSINESS'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend the second cause of action for breach of contract. More specificity required regarding contract (employment contract? Whistle blower policy a contract?) and provisions of breach. Demurrer overruled as to third cause of action for violation of public policy. =(302/CWW/JW)
